What is Pkitaap?

Pkitaap is India's free marketplace for buying and selling used school textbooks. Built for students of Class 9 to Class 12 across all major boards — CBSE, SEBA, AHSEC and more — in English, Assamese and Hindi medium.

Sell your old books in under a minute. Find affordable textbooks from sellers near you. Chat directly with buyers and sellers through our built-in messaging system. No commissions, no middlemen, no listing fees.

Pkitaap is designed for students across India, with state, district and locality-based search to help buyers find books from nearby sellers. Whether you're starting a new academic year and need cheap textbooks, or you've finished your class and want to recover the cost of your old books, Pkitaap is the easiest place to do both.

Save money on books. Give your old textbooks a second life. Help fellow Indian students afford their education.
